questions.question: [FALLBACK] Recent news Item #3 regarding events for medium difficulty?
Which is the largest planet in our solar system?
Who wrote the national anthem of India?
A can complete a piece of work in 38 days while B can complete the same work in 42 days. If they work together, in how many days will they complete the work?
questions.explanation: Work = 38 * 42 = 1596. Rate = 38 + 42 = 80. Time = Work / Rate = 19.95 days.

questions.question:
Statements:
1. All Apples are Fruits.
2. All Fruits are Foods.

Which conclusion logically follows?
questions.explanation: If A is a subset of B, and B is a subset of C, then A must be a subset of C completely.
questions.trick: Draw a venn diagram: Small circle A inside Medium B inside Large C.

questions.question: [FALLBACK] Recent news Item #4 regarding events for medium difficulty?
What will be the Simple Interest on a principal amount of Rs. 7800 at an interest rate of 5% per annum over 2 years?
Find the odd one out among the following numbers: 36, 25, 49, 101
questions.explanation: 25, 36, and 49 are perfect squares. 101 is not a perfect square.
questions.trick: Memorize squares up to 30 to instantly spot discrepancies.

questions.question: If an article is bought for Rs. 420 and sold at a profit of 30%, what is the selling price?
questions.trick: Calculate 10% of CP, multiply, and add it conceptually.

questions.question: Find the next number in the series: 4, 14, 24, 34, 44, ?
questions.explanation: The series follows an Arithmetic Progression with a constant difference of 10. So, 44 + (10) = 54.
questions.trick: Always check the difference between the first and second terms and verify across the series.

questions.question: [FALLBACK] Recent news Item #6 regarding events for medium difficulty?
What is the average of the following 5 consecutive even numbers: 36, 38, 40, 42, 44?
questions.trick: For a consecutive arithmetic sequence, the average is simply the exact middle term.

questions.question: [FALLBACK] Recent news Item #5 regarding events for medium difficulty?
Which is the longest river in the world?
[FALLBACK] Recent news Item #2 regarding events for medium difficulty?
If MAT is coded as NBU, how will PEN be coded in that same language?
questions.explanation: Each letter is shifted forward by exactly 1 positions in the English alphabet.
questions.trick: Note the position gap between the first letter of the word and the first letter of its code.
